extraction.one_line_summary: MARCZYNSKI Thomas attacked twice on final climb Puerto de Torcal (21km out), soloed to win while CONTADOR Alberto late-race attack plus FROOME crash gained 40 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Contador attacked 20km from finish to join teammate in breakaway, exploiting Froome mechanical/crash vulnerability on descent.
Marczynski's double acceleration on Torcal eliminated Friday/Rojas, proving Polish champion could sustain repeated efforts at altitude.
Sky's tempo control gave breakaway 9 minutes but collapsed when Froome crashed, losing defensive formation at critical descent moment.

rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: Aggressively attacked with 20km remaining to join teammate in break, exploiting terrain knowledge for 40-second gain
rider_signals.FROOME Christopher: negative: Mechanical issue plus crash on descent revealed nervousness and vulnerability when isolated from Sky teammates
rider_signals.MARCZYNSKI Thomas: positive: Second Vuelta stage win confirms ability to repeat explosive efforts on climbs, Tour de France weakness doesn't translate to Vuelta
rider_signals.DEVAL Julian: negative: Crashed on Puerta de Leon descent while in winning break, lost contact with 14-man group
